stratumFlow.description: Save workflow versions, compare diffs, rollback to any previous version. Critical for enterprise compliance.
Visual branch editor with parallel execution paths, merge conditions, and timeout handling.
Real-time sync between StratumFlow workflow data and Salesforce objects. Currently one-way only.

stratumConnect.description: Add PKCE flow for public clients (SPAs, mobile apps). Required by several enterprise customers.
Configurable retry with exponential backoff, dead letter queues, and alerting on webhook delivery failures.

stratumAnalytics.description: Pre-built dashboard templates for common workflow patterns (approvals, onboarding, support tickets).
